items.q: In what year was No Country for Old Men released?
items.explanation: No Country for Old Men is a 2007 American neo-Western crime thriller film written, directed, produced, and edited by Joel and Ethan Coen, based on Cormac McCarthy's 2005 novel.

items.q: Joel Coen and Ethan Coen directed Spirited Away.
items.explanation: Spirited Away was directed by Hayao Miyazaki.

items.q: Who directed The Grand Budapest Hotel?
items.explanation: The Grand Budapest Hotel is a 2014 comedy-drama film written and directed by Wes Anderson.

items.q: Which decade was Fight Club released in?
items.explanation: Fight Club came out in 1999, which is the 1990s.

items.q: In what year was Inception released?
items.explanation: Inception is a 2010 science fiction action film written and directed by Christopher Nolan, who also produced it with Emma Thomas, his wife.

items.q: Which decade was Interstellar released in?
items.explanation: Interstellar came out in 2014, which is the 2010s.

Pan's Labyrinth is a 2006 Spanish-language dark fantasy film written, directed and co-produced by Guillermo del Toro. The film stars Ivana Baquero, Sergi Lopez, Maribel Verdu, Doug Jones, and Ariadna Gil.

items.q: Who was one of the directors of City of God?
items.explanation: City of God was co-directed by Fernando Meirelles and Katia Lund.

Trainspotting is a 1996 British black comedy drama film directed by Danny Boyle, and starring Ewan McGregor, Ewen Bremner, Jonny Lee Miller, Kevin McKidd, Robert Carlyle and Kelly Macdonald in her film debut.
